daily.today_energy: Your vibe is giving curiosity meets creative flow. Mercury's dancing in your favor, so lean into those random thoughts popping up—they're actually breadcrumbs to something good.
daily.love: If you're coupled up, share something vulnerable today. If you're single, someone's been noticing your energy from afar. Either way, authenticity is your love language rn.
daily.career: Your communication skills are absolutely *chef's kiss* today. Whether it's pitching an idea or collaborating, people are genuinely listening. Trust that momentum.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishing. A walk, some stretching, or dancing to your fave playlist hits different today. Listen to what feels nourishing.

weekly.overview: Mercury's doing its thing this week, Gemini. You're in your communication era—expect meaningful conversations that shift something internally. Trust the timing, even if it feels unconventional. Your intuition is genuinely strong rn.
weekly.love: Whether single or coupled, there's a vibe shift happening. If you've been holding back words, this week's giving permission to be honest. The right people will meet you there. Vulnerability isn't weakness, it's literally magnetic energy.
weekly.career: Your ideas are landing differently this week. Don't play small with your thoughts—they're valuable. This is a good time to pitch, propose, or pivot something you've been thinking about. Your instincts about what needs to change are spot on.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Movement that feels good over movement that feels like punishment. Hydrate, ground yourself, and actually rest when you need to. Your nervous system deserves that attention you'd give a friend.
